characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Book Dumb: Not exactly an honors student but when it comes to skateboarding, he knows everything. He actually appears to be smart and serious, especially compared to Luther, but his grades are very low. Cloudcuckoolander's Minder: His friend Luther isThe Ditzwho acts before thinking, and Zeke frequently tries to keep him out of trouble. Determinator: When it comes to his goals and his skateboarding career, nothing can stop him. Green-Eyed Monster: He is none too happy on those occasions when Luther proves successful without him or is poised to break one of his records. Heterosexual Life-Partners: He and Luther are best friends who share the same interest in skateboarding.

characters.name: Zeke
characters.description: Book Dumb: Not exactly an honors student but when it comes to skateboarding, he knows everything. He actually appears to be smart and serious, especially compared to Luther, but his grades are very low. Cloudcuckoolander's Minder: His friend Luther isThe Ditzwho acts before thinking, and Zeke frequently tries to keep him out of trouble. Determinator: When it comes to his goals and his skateboarding career, nothing can stop him. Green-Eyed Monster: He is none too happy on those occasions when Luther proves successful without him or is poised to break one of his records. Heterosexual Life-Partners: He and Luther are best friends who share the same interest in skateboarding.

characters.name: Luther
characters.description: Cloudcuckoolander: Has a goofy personality and many quirky habits, and often needs Zeke to act as hisCloudcuckoolander's Minder. The Ditz: Not that bright. Such as when he thinks a hospital bedpan is a guacamole bowl and asks if he can have one. Heterosexual Life-Partners: He and Zeke are best friends who share the same interest in skateboarding. Jerkass to One: Towards Ozzie, whom he considers a poser that's always copying him. Even Kojo and Ginger don't get as much disdain from Luther as Ozzie does. Significant Birth Date: "Luther Turns 4" reveals he was born on February 29th, so every four years, he crams in as much birthday fun as possible on his special day. After a prank gone wrong forces him and Zeke to coach a kids' basketball team, he exploits a loophole that allows him to play on the team since he's technically only four. It works, and he ends up doing similarly for other teams (much to the irritation of the actual children).

characters.name: Kojo
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: Zeke makes him the butt of jokes at times. Sometimes he brings it upon himself. Casanova Wannabe: Downplayed. He is shown dating often enough and has a sizable little black book, but he's constantly exaggerating what a player he is and is far more likely to be shown being rejected in such instances. He had far more luck with Zeke's cousin, Mia, when being down to Earth rather than doing what he usually does. Catchphrase: "Watch out!" while slapping his buttocks. Disappeared Dad: Kojo constantly refers to his mother but his father is never seen or heard, he is usually mentioned that he is on vacation. Everyone Has Standards:He looked concerned when Luther lost his baby tooth.He was also as shocked as Luther when Zeke fell into the ocean after a failed stunt.He also doesn't like the Plunks anymore than Zeke and Luther do.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: Annoying Younger Sibling: Oh yes. In "Sludge" she even states how much she loves annoying Zeke when she follows him to ramps. Brainy Brunette: Very smart. Luther eventhought that she was a cyborgas well. Catchphrase:Ginger repeatedly calls Zeke and Luther "pit-sniffers". In return, Zeke usually calls Ginger "mini-munch."Ginger also tends to say "Oh yeah, baby!" when things are going her way. Ginger repeatedly calls Zeke and Luther "pit-sniffers". In return, Zeke usually calls Ginger "mini-munch." Ginger also tends to say "Oh yeah, baby!" when things are going her way.

characters.name: Ozzie
characters.description: Badass Bookworm: He is normally a scrawny weakling, but in the episode "Goin Zoomin" when he saw the strong-man champion chatting up to the girl who dumped him for being a weakling, he is more than motivated to pull a heavy truck all the way to the finish line."Luther Unleashed" shows that he is a great skateographer (Skateboarding Photographer).He did a good job of designing and setting up Zeke's new garage pad.The series finale shows thathe is also a great actor, getting the part in the movie Zeke was originally going to replace Vin in. "Luther Unleashed" shows that he is a great skateographer (Skateboarding Photographer). He did a good job of designing and setting up Zeke's new garage pad. The series finale shows thathe is also a great actor, getting the part in the movie Zeke was originally going to replace Vin in. Catchphrase: While not exactly a catchphrase, his signature move is rudely sticking out his butt.

characters.name: Kirby
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: He is repeatedly insulted and dismissed, as well as often suffers assorted slapstick. Informed Flaw: In theChristmas Episode, he is dismissed by Zeke as the most spoiled kid in the neighborhood. While Kirby's parents certainly shower him with expensive gifts, every single appearance up to this point portrayed Kirby as a friendly figure constantly helping the others in their antics and never once flaunting his family's wealth.

characters.name: Lisa
characters.description: Stalker with a Crush: To Zeke.

characters.name: The Plunks
characters.description: Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Doyce is absent after season 2 but Charlie appears again but with a different brother

characters.name: Poochie
characters.description: Catchphrase: Yay (insert quote here) Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Does not appear after Season 2

characters.name: Stinky Cast
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: To Ginger, due to his poor hygiene habits (tops of all his cast) and how blunt he is about his interest in her. Bunny-Ears Lawyer: Despite his age and quirky habits, he's actually a gifted cameraman and is often hired by Zeke and Luther to film their stunts. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Does not appear after Season 2 Everyone Calls Him "Barkeep": Everyone calls him "Stinky Cast" even though people know his real name which is "Garret Delfino".

characters.name: Jumpsuit
characters.description: Everyone Calls Him "Barkeep": EVERYONE calls him "Jumpsuit" except for his wife Mabel who calls him by his actual name: Reginald/Reggie. Hoist by His Own Petard: In Law and Boarder, he creates a bunch of laws banning various activities in the neighborhood (skateboarding, food stands, sagging, you name it) and after he went way too far, the kids hatch a plan to get back at him by tricking him into breaking all of the laws he made and approved of.
